core_mechanism: a hybrid Lagrangian-Eulerian (material-point / particle-in-cell) discretization that repeatedly transfers state between moving material carriers and a fixed background grid to resolve large continuum deformation and contact between bodies
brief_reason: The abstract states the method is a hybrid-MPM framework 'integrating Lagrangian finite element and Eulerian finite difference frameworks' to simulate large deformation with complex contact, which is exactly a particle-grid transfer scheme.
